title: Java Backend Developer
about: SunbaseData is a B2B SaaS company building CRM and data intelligence tools for enterprise clients across India and Southeast Asia. With a team of 80+ engineers, we move fast and ship real products.
description: We are looking for a motivated Java Backend Developer intern to join our core engineering team. You will work on building RESTful APIs, optimizing database queries, and contributing to our CRM microservices architecture. You'll collaborate directly with senior engineers in code reviews and sprint planning. This is a hands-on role — you ship code from day one.
responsibilities: Design and build REST APIs using Spring Boot
Write unit and integration tests with JUnit
Optimize MySQL queries and database schemas
Participate in daily standups and sprint retrospectives
Document your code and maintain technical specs
requirements: Strong knowledge of Java (8+) and OOP principles
Familiarity with Spring Boot or similar frameworks
Basic understanding of SQL and relational databases
Knowledge of Git and version control workflows
Currently pursuing B.Tech/B.E. in Computer Science or related field
perks: Letter of recommendation
Certificate of completion
Flexible working hours
Pre-placement offer for top performers

title: Frontend Developer
about: Across The Globe (ATG) is a global e-learning platform helping students and professionals upskill through interactive courses. We serve 500,000+ learners across 40 countries.
description: Join our frontend team to build beautiful, responsive web interfaces for our learning platform. You'll work with React and Tailwind CSS, collaborating with UX designers to turn Figma designs into pixel-perfect code. You'll also be involved in performance optimization and A/B testing to improve user engagement.
responsibilities: Build and maintain responsive UI components in React
Collaborate with designers to implement Figma mockups
Optimize page load times and Core Web Vitals
Fix bugs and perform cross-browser compatibility testing
Write clean, maintainable CSS and JavaScript
requirements: Proficiency in HTML, CSS, JavaScript (ES6+)
Experience with React or Vue.js
Familiarity with Git and basic CI/CD concepts
Eye for UI/UX detail and pixel-perfect implementation
Bonus: experience with Tailwind CSS or Framer Motion
perks: Work directly with the product team
Certificate and LOR
Flexible remote work
Possibility of full-time offer

title: Webinar Operations & Strategy Intern
about: Simplilearn is one of the world's leading online bootcamp providers, with over 2 million learners across 150+ countries. We are backed by Blackstone and headquartered in San Francisco and Bangalore.
description: As a Webinar Operations & Strategy Intern, you will own the end-to-end execution of live webinar events — from speaker coordination to post-event analytics. You'll work with the Growth Marketing team to craft engagement strategies that drive registrations and convert attendees into enrolled students.
responsibilities: Plan and execute 10–15 live webinars per month
Manage speaker briefs, slide decks, and logistics
Monitor live session KPIs and generate post-event reports
Run A/B tests on registration pages and email campaigns
Maintain webinar calendar and cross-team coordination
requirements: Strong written and verbal communication skills
Experience with Zoom Webinar, Hopin, or similar platforms
Data-driven mindset — comfortable working in Excel/Sheets
Ability to manage multiple deadlines without dropping the ball
Background in marketing, business, or communication preferred
perks: Stipend + performance bonus
Direct mentorship from senior marketing leaders
Certificate and LOR
Access to all Simplilearn courses for free during internship

title: Software Development Intern
about: IIT Bombay is one of India's premier technical institutions and a global leader in research and innovation. Our research labs develop cutting-edge tools used by industry and academia worldwide.
description: This internship is part of the Vāgyojaka Tool project — a speech synthesis and NLP research initiative at IIT Bombay's Linguistics lab. You'll contribute to building a tool that enables accurate text-to-speech for Indian languages, working alongside PhD researchers and faculty advisors.
responsibilities: Develop Python modules for NLP preprocessing pipelines
Integrate speech synthesis APIs and fine-tune outputs
Build a lightweight web interface for tool demonstration
Write research documentation and test case reports
Collaborate with linguists and ML researchers
requirements: Strong Python programming skills
Familiarity with NLP libraries (NLTK, spaCy, or HuggingFace)
Interest in linguistics, speech, or regional Indian languages
Ability to work independently with minimal supervision
Bonus: experience with TTS systems or audio processing
perks: Research internship certificate from IIT Bombay
Co-authorship opportunity on research papers
Access to IIT Bombay's research resources and clusters
Strong alumni network and academic recommendation

title: Full Stack Web Developer Intern
about: Celebrare is a fast-growing D2C gifting and events platform that connects people with personalized celebration experiences. We've delivered 100,000+ experiences across 25+ Indian cities.
description: We're hiring a Full Stack Developer Intern to help us scale our gifting platform. You'll work across our Node.js backend and React frontend, shipping features that directly impact user experience. Expect real ownership — you'll be building things that thousands of customers interact with every week.
responsibilities: Develop new features across frontend (React) and backend (Node.js)
Build and document REST APIs consumed by mobile and web apps
Integrate payment gateways and third-party logistics APIs
Write clean, well-tested code with meaningful pull requests
Collaborate with the design and product teams in Agile sprints
requirements: Working knowledge of JavaScript (React + Node.js)
Experience with MongoDB or any NoSQL database
Comfortable with REST APIs and JSON
Basic Git and GitHub workflow knowledge
Self-motivated with the ability to ship independently
perks: Performance-based stipend revision
Certificate and strong LOR
Potential to transition into a full-time role
Swag kit from Celebrare 🎁

title: UX Design Intern

description: We're looking for a UX Design Intern who's passionate about creating experiences that feel intuitive and delightful. You'll join our product design team, working on real enterprise AI products used by thousands of business users daily. From wireframes to polished Figma prototypes, you'll own the full design lifecycle of specific features.
responsibilities: Create wireframes, user flows, and interactive prototypes in Figma
Conduct user research, usability tests, and competitive analysis
Collaborate closely with product managers and engineers
Maintain and expand our design system library
Present designs in stakeholder reviews and incorporate feedback
requirements: Strong portfolio demonstrating UX process and thinking
Proficiency in Figma or Adobe XD
Understanding of design principles (hierarchy, spacing, color theory)
Ability to take feedback and iterate quickly
Bonus: experience with motion design or micro-interactions
perks: US-exposure working with global enterprise clients
Mentorship from senior UX leads with FAANG experience
Certificate + strong reference
Flexible work hours to balance college schedule

title: HR – Talent Acquisition Intern
about: Niva Bupa (formerly Max Bupa) is one of India's leading standalone health insurers with 7 million+ customers and a network of 10,000+ hospitals. We're backed by Bupa, one of the world's largest healthcare groups.
description: Join our People & Culture team as an HR Talent Acquisition Intern. You'll support end-to-end recruitment for our technology, operations, and sales functions — from sourcing and screening to offer rollout. This is a fast-paced role where you'll learn the full recruitment cycle at scale.
responsibilities: Source candidates via LinkedIn, job boards, and campus drives
Screen resumes and schedule interviews with hiring managers
Coordinate with candidates and ensure a smooth interview process
Maintain recruitment dashboards and ATS data hygiene
Assist in employer branding and campus engagement initiatives
requirements: Strong interpersonal and communication skills
Basic understanding of HR concepts and recruitment processes
Comfortable with Excel/Google Sheets for tracking
Detail-oriented and able to manage high-volume tasks
Pursuing MBA or BBA (HR specialization preferred)
perks: Exposure to enterprise-scale hiring across 20+ cities
Mentored by experienced HR business partners
Certificate, LOR, and potential PPO
Access to Niva Bupa's L&D programs

title: Web Maintenance & DevOps Intern
about: Tata Motors is India's largest automobile manufacturer and a global player in commercial vehicles, electric mobility, and passenger cars. Our Digital & IT division drives transformation across our global operations.
description: Join the IT Applications team at Tata Motors to maintain and optimize our dealer and customer-facing web portals. You'll work on bug fixes, performance monitoring, and minor feature enhancements under the guidance of senior engineers. You'll also get exposure to cloud infrastructure (AWS/Azure) and CI/CD pipelines.
responsibilities: Monitor and maintain web portal uptime using New Relic and CloudWatch
Investigate and resolve production bugs raised by dealer support teams
Deploy updates via CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins/GitHub Actions)
Write scripts to automate routine maintenance tasks
Document incidents and maintain runbooks for common issues
requirements: Basic knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript
Familiarity with Linux command line and shell scripting
Understanding of Git and deployment workflows
Analytical mindset for debugging production issues
Bonus: exposure to AWS, Azure, or Docker
perks: Work inside a globally recognized engineering organization
Exposure to enterprise DevOps practices
Certificate from Tata Motors IT team
Strong resume credential for placements

title: Environmental Education Program Intern
about: WWF-India (World Wide Fund for Nature) is one of the largest conservation organizations in the country, working across biodiversity, climate, freshwater, and education. We run programs with 500+ schools and 1M+ students across India.
description: This internship is part of WWF-India's Environmental Education initiative in Mumbai. You'll help design and deliver conservation awareness workshops for school students, working alongside educators and field conservation experts. It's a purpose-driven role that blends creativity, communication, and impact.
responsibilities: Design age-appropriate environmental education modules for K–12 students
Conduct classroom sessions and field visits at partner schools
Develop visual content (infographics, presentations, activity kits)
Track program participation metrics and compile impact reports
Support event coordination for WWF's annual wildlife campaigns
requirements: Passion for environmental conservation and education
Strong public speaking and classroom facilitation skills
Ability to simplify complex topics for young audiences
Basic design skills (Canva or similar tools) a plus
Background in environmental science, education, or social work preferred
perks: Work directly in wildlife and conservation education
Certificate from WWF-India
Immersive field exposure across Mumbai's ecosystems
Strong community and network within the conservation sector

title: Graphic Design Intern

You'll work closely with marketing and product to maintain a consistent, modern visual language.

Produce pitch deck visuals and investor presentation assets
requirements: Proficiency in Figma, Adobe Illustrator, and Photoshop
Strong portfolio showcasing brand, digital, or UI design work
Understanding of visual hierarchy, typography, and color theory
Ability to take briefs and deliver polished outputs quickly
Bonus: motion graphics experience (After Effects or Lottie)
perks: Your designs go live and reach 50K+ users monthly

Potential full-time design role for outstanding performers

title: SEO & Content Marketing Intern

description: As an SEO & Content Marketing Intern, you'll help our clients rank higher on Google and drive organic traffic. You'll conduct keyword research, optimize on-page content, build backlinks, and write SEO-friendly blog posts. This role gives you direct exposure to real client accounts and measurable results.
responsibilities: Conduct keyword research using SEMrush, Ahrefs, and Google Search Console
Optimize meta titles, descriptions, headings, and internal links
Write long-form, SEO-optimized blog content (1500–3000 words)
Build quality backlinks through outreach and content partnerships
Prepare weekly SEO performance reports for clients
requirements: Understanding of SEO fundamentals (on-page, off-page, technical)
Excellent writing skills in English with attention to grammar
Familiarity with Google Analytics and Search Console
Analytical mindset and ability to interpret ranking data
Bonus: experience with WordPress, Webflow, or Shopify
perks: Work on real client accounts from day one
